mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students(full_name, kana_name, nickname, email, area, telephone, age, sex, remark, is_deleted) VALUES(#{fullName}, #{kanaName}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{area}, #{telephone}, #{age}, #{sex}, #{remark}, false)
INSERT INTO student_courses(student_id, course_code, status_id, course_apply_at) VALUES(#{studentId}, #{courseCode}, #{statusId}, #{courseApplyAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM students WHERE student_id=#{studentId} AND is_deleted=false
